scope: URL/hash diff only. No official images, screenshots, copied titles as public summaries, or copied article text.
robotsSummary: robots.txt not found on pokemon-card.com; no disallow-all observed in manual audit.
termsSummary: Official site policy restricts copying site data and requests text links only. Public cards must use original summaries and official links.

scope: Low-frequency campaign/news URL/hash diff only. Store-specific details remain on official pages.
robotsSummary: No disallow-all observed across McDonald's Japan, Yoshinoya, Sukiya, CoCo Ichibanya, and Skylark hosts.
termsSummary: No image or campaign text copying. Admin must write original summaries and keep official detail links visible.

scope: Official news/product link diff only. No character art, article text copying, screenshots, or logo use.
